sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109976" key="u(yipe/talos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψῐ-πέτᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109976.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑψίκομος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg004.perseus-grc1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>, Com. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κράμβαι,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0499.tlg001:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyzel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
